judge_calls.reasoning: Part 1 (35%): Covers all 5 core topics (GPT-5, K8s, agent frameworks, RAG, open-source LLM benchmarks) plus regulation, with accurate and insightful summaries. Score 1.0. Part 2 (35%): Strong editorial structure with title, foreword, organized sections, highlighted picks, and clear summaries. Lacks explicit cross-article connections but otherwise complete. Score 0.9. Part 3 (30%): Included EU AI Act with summary, excluded blockchain with filter reasoning, but did not separately address AI in Film VFX or provide detailed reasoning for each borderline article. Adequate but not thorough. Score 0.7. Weighted: 0.35×1.0 + 0.35×0.9 + 0.30×0.7 = 0.88.
judge_calls.rubric_preview:
Evaluate the agent's newsletter editorial quality, topic coverage, and borderline article handling.
Score each of the three parts separately, then compute a weighted final score (0-1).

=== Part 1: Topic Coverage & Summary Quality (weight 35%) ===
The newsletter should cover these core AI/tech topic
